mapper.insert: INSERT INTO know_posts (id, creator_id, status, type, visible, is_top, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{creatorId}, 'draft', 'image_text', COALESCE(#{visible}, 'public'), 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE know_posts SET content_object_key = #{contentObjectKey}, content_etag = #{contentEtag}, content_size = #{contentSize}, content_sha256 = #{contentSha256}, content_url = #{contentUrl}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND creator_id = #{creatorId} AND status = 'draft'
UPDATE know_posts SET status = 'published', publish_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
UPDATE know_posts SET is_top = #{isTop}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
UPDATE know_posts SET visible = #{visible}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
UPDATE know_posts SET status = 'deleted', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls, p.is_top, u.avatar AS author_avatar, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.tags_json AS author_tag_json FROM know_posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 'published' AND p.visible = 'public' ORDER BY p.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls, p.is_top, u.avatar AS author_avatar, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.tags_json AS author_tag_json, p.status, p.visible, p.creator_id FROM know_posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.creator_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
